trivia_bullets.text: Staff of the Sun Magus (no. 222) is the white member of the five-card 'Staff of the Magus' cycle in M14 (nos. 219-223). See Staff of the Death Magus (no. 219) entry for full cycle breakdown. Unlike the red and blue staffs (nos. 220-221), the Sun Magus was not reprinted in M15, making the M14 printing the only non-promo printing.
sources: Scryfall: reprint field and collector numbers for M14 nos. 219-223

trivia_bullets.text: Triggers on any white spell cast OR any Plains-typed land entering. The ruling: the land subtype 'Plains' is what matters, not mana production. Dual lands or filter lands producing white mana without the Plains subtype do not trigger the staff.

"A symbol of conviction in uncertain times." — no attributed speaker. Parallel flavor-text structure across the cycle: 'ambition in ruthless times' (Death), 'conviction in uncertain times' (Sun), 'ferocity in oppressive times' (Wild).
Artist Daniel Ljunggren illustrated three of the five M14 staff cycle cards (Death, Sun, Wild). His portfolio site is listed as darylart.com.
sources: Gatherer: Daniel Ljunggren artist search (191 cards)

trivia_bullets.text: EDHREC rank 13,085 — mid-range among the five staffs. White's rich lifegain synergy ecosystem (Soul Warden, Archangel of Thune, Heliod) gives this modest play but it competes with far more efficient white lifegain payoffs.
